allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== SPF \(TXT @ mailient.xyz\) ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name mailient.xyz -Type TXT -ErrorAction Stop\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Strings -join '' } } catch { Write-Host "no TXT / lookup failed" }; Write-Host "=== DMARC \(_dmarc.mailient.xyz\) ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name _dmarc.mailient.xyz -Type TXT -ErrorAction Stop\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Strings -join '' } } catch { Write-Host "NO DMARC RECORD" }; Write-Host "=== DKIM \(resend._domainkey\) ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name resend._domainkey.mailient.xyz -Type TXT -ErrorAction Stop\) | ForEach-Object { \($_.Strings -join ''\).Substring\(0, 60\) + '...' } } catch { Write-Host "no resend DKIM selector found" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== send.mailient.xyz TXT \(Resend return-path SPF\) ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name send.mailient.xyz -Type TXT -ErrorAction Stop\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Strings -join '' } } catch { Write-Host "none" }; Write-Host "=== send.mailient.xyz MX ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name send.mailient.xyz -Type MX -ErrorAction Stop\) | ForEach-Object { $_.NameExchange } } catch { Write-Host "none" }; Write-Host "=== root MX ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name mailient.xyz -Type MX -ErrorAction Stop\) | ForEach-Object { $_.NameExchange } } catch { Write-Host "none" })
Bash(grep -n "return { decide, chase, showUp, briefing }" lib/arcus/today-agent.ts)
